zh.Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾姆 代可其
zh.Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西
zh.Mynde Manor House, Kilpeck, Herefordshir: 英國英格蘭賀福爾吉爾培可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Scudamore於1398年出生在英國賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西時，她的父親Sir John de Scudamore, Knight23歲，母親Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr21歲。她於1418年與John Pye在英國英格蘭賀福爾吉爾培可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1480年在英國賀福爾吉爾培可享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Scudamore于1398年出生在英国賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西时，她的父亲Sir John de Scudamore, Knight23岁，母亲Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr21岁。她于1418年与John Pye在英国英格兰賀福爾吉爾培可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1480年在英国賀福爾吉爾培可享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Scudamore was born in 1398, in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir John de Scudamore, Knight, was 23 and her mother, Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, was 21. She married John Pye in 1418, in Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1480, in Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Scudamore est née en 1398, à Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Scudamore, Knight, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Pye en 1418, à Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1480, à Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Scudamore 1398 in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Scudamore, Knight 23 und ihre Mutter Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr 21. Sie hat 1418 in Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom John Pye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Scudamore è nata il nel 1398 nel Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Scudamore, Knight, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Pye nel 1418, nel Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1480, nel Kilpeck, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Scudamoreが1398年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアホールメ ラシで生まれた時，父Sir John de Scudamore, Knightは23歳，母Alys ferch Owain Glyndwrは21歳であった。1418年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキルペックでJohn Pyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1480年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキルペックで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Scudamore(이)가 1398년 영국 허퍼드실르 홀 레이시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Scudamore, Knight(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킬펙에서 John Pye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 허퍼드실르 킬펙에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Scudamore nasceu em 1398, em Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Scudamore, Knight, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Pye em 1418, em Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1480, em Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Scudamore родилась в 1398 г. в местности холм ласи, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Scudamore, Knight было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pye в 1418 г. в местности килпекк, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1480 г. в местности килпекк, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Scudamore nació en 1398, en Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Scudamore, Knight, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Pye en 1418, en Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1480, en Kilpeck, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
